reasoning: The control '3_1_3: Control the flow of CUI in accordance with approved authorizations' is primarily about ensuring that sensitive data (CUI) is only accessible and transmitted according to specific authorizations. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network policies that restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that only authorized communication paths are allowed. Additionally, RBAC can enforce least privilege access to control who can access and manage resources. Restricting the use of LoadBalancer services can prevent exposing services directly to the internet, aligning with the control's intent to manage data flow.
title: 3_1_3: 3.1.3 Control the flow of CUI in accordance with approved authorizations
